title: meridiana pinnata
intro: Meridiana pinnata, also known as the Pinyun or Pin Yin, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Meridiana in the family Rutaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Meridiana pinnata include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and indigestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
